# Project blueprint

<!-- mol:map:managed begin -->
<!-- This block is regenerated by /mol:map. Custom annotations go
     OUTSIDE these markers and are preserved across re-runs. -->

_Generated 2026-05-19 by /mol:map (whole-repo scope, post-FileSystem-and-Folder refresh)._

## Inventory (layered)

Three-layer dependency direction: **workspace ← workflow ← agent**, with the
application shell (server / cli / plugins) on top and the UI downstream of
the server's OpenAPI surface. A small set of cross-layer primitives
(`molexp.path`, `molexp._typing`, `molexp._logger`, `molexp.entry`,
`molexp.monitor`, `molexp.tree_monitor`, `molexp._run_cancel`,
`molexp.config`, `molexp.git`) sit *above* the workspace layer but are
explicitly designed to be cited from any layer.

### Module list

**Layer 0 — `src/molexp/` (cross-layer primitives, package root)**
- `molexp` (`__init__.py`) — re-exports the user-facing hierarchy (`Workspace` / `Project` / `Experiment` / `Run` / `RunContext` / `Path` / `Logger` / `get_logger` / `entry` / `ParamSpace` / `GridSpace` / `UniformSpace`); lazy `__getattr__` for `workspace` / `workflow` / `plugins`.
- `molexp._typing` — `JSONValue` and shared narrow typing aliases.
- `molexp._logger` — `Logger` (subclasses `mollog.Logger`) + `get_logger`; package-local logger factory.
- `molexp._run_cancel` — Cancel-helpers for the explore-tree monitor (molq job lookup / local PID / "cannot cancel" fallback).
- `molexp.entry` — `entry()` registry + `load_workspaces()` / `find_workflow_for_run()` / `load_workflow_from_entrypoint()`; the script-level workflow discovery surface.
- `molexp.monitor` — `RunMonitor`: lifecycle controller for the full-screen run dashboard (delegates rendering to `molq.dashboard.RunDashboard`).
- `molexp.path` — `Path` (subclasses `pathlib.PurePosixPath`); cross-host POSIX path primitive, no I/O.
- `molexp.tree_monitor` — Interactive collapsible workspace tree for `molexp workspace ... explore`.
- `molexp.config` (subpackage: `__init__.py`, `loader.py`, `models.py`) — `MolCfg` / `ProfileConfig` / `load_molcfg` / `normalize_profile_name` / `DEFAULT_CONFIG_FILENAMES`.
- `molexp.git` (subpackage: `__init__.py`, `_subprocess.py`, `operations.py`, `worktree.py`) — `ensure_clone` / `fetch` / `push` / `GitWorktreeManager`; thin async wrappers around the `git` binary.

**Layer 1 — `src/molexp/workspace/` (bottom — pure storage)**
- `molexp.workspace` (`__init__.py`) — package root re-exporting the public storage surface.
- `molexp.workspace.assets` (subpackage: `__init__.py`, `_adapter.py`, `accessors.py`, `artifact.py`, `base.py`, `checkpoint.py`, `data.py`, `error.py`, `execution.py`, `lineage.py`, `log.py`, `manifest.py`, `output.py`, `view.py`) — typed Asset hierarchy + per-scope manifest + `DataAssetLibrary`.
- `molexp.workspace.cache` (subpackage: `__init__.py`, `folder.py`) — `CacheFolder` singleton (lowercase property `ws.cache`); exposes `as_cache_store()` adapter for the workflow layer's `CacheStore` Protocol.
- `molexp.workspace.catalog` (subpackage: `__init__.py`, `folder.py`, `index.py`) — `CatalogFolder` singleton (lowercase property `ws.catalog`) hosting `AssetCatalog`; assets re-export shim lives in `assets/catalog` for back-compat.
- `molexp.workspace.base` — atomic-JSON I/O (`atomic_write_json` / `atomic_write_text`) + container-index helpers (`_rebuild_container_index` / `_load_metadata` / `_save_metadata`).
- `molexp.workspace.checkpoint` — `CheckpointState` model + file IO.
- `molexp.workspace.context` — `Context` data model.
- `molexp.workspace.errors` — workspace exception hierarchy (`ProjectExistsError` / `ProjectNotFoundError` / `ExperimentExistsError` / `ExperimentNotFoundError` / `RunExistsError` / `RunNotFoundError` / `FolderMoveCollisionError`).
- `molexp.workspace.experiment` — `Experiment(Folder)` entity.
- `molexp.workspace.folder` — `Folder` base class (unified directory primitive: parent pointer, lazy mkdir, atomic JSON I/O, kind-checked metadata, generic five-verb CRUD `add_folder/get_folder/has_folder/list_folders/remove_folder`, auto-derived index filenames from `cls.__name__` snake_case + `.json`) + `WORKSPACE_ROOT_KIND` / `WORKSPACE_PROJECT_KIND` / `WORKSPACE_EXPERIMENT_KIND` / `WORKSPACE_RUN_KIND` constants.
- `molexp.workspace.fs` — `FileSystem` `@runtime_checkable` `Protocol` + `PathArg` alias + `StatResult` frozen dataclass; the pluggable I/O contract.
- `molexp.workspace.fs_local` — `LocalFileSystem` (stdlib-backed: pathlib + os + shutil); structural conformance asserted at import.
- `molexp.workspace.fs_remote` — `RemoteFileSystem` (wraps `molq.transport.Transport` for SSH-backed workspaces).
- `molexp.workspace.metrics` — run-local JSONL metrics (in-tree, not a plugin).
- `molexp.workspace.models` — `FolderMetadata` (base for the agent-layer metadata models) + `WorkspaceMetadata` / `ProjectMetadata` / `ExperimentMetadata` / `RunMetadata` / `ExecutionRecord` / `ComputeTarget` / `ErrorInfo`.
- `molexp.workspace.param` — `ParamSpace` / `GridSpace` / `UniformSpace` / `Params`.
- `molexp.workspace.project` — `Project(Folder)` entity.
- `molexp.workspace.resume_policy` — `WalltimeChunk` + resume policies.
- `molexp.workspace.run` — `Run(Folder)` + `RunContext` (sync + async context manager) + `RunStatus`.
- `molexp.workspace.schema_version` — JSON-schema version constant + load/upgrade helpers.
- `molexp.workspace.target` (new singular module) — `Target` value-type sum (`LocalTarget` / `RemoteTarget`), `parse_target` / `resolve_target` / `target_to_transport` / `target_to_filesystem`, `Session` / `SessionManager` (cached SSH connections), `TargetNotFound` / `TargetNeedsResolution`. The unified target abstraction the new CLI consumes.
- `molexp.workspace.targets` (legacy plural module, retained) — compute-target registry helpers (`add_target` / `get_target` / `has_target` / `list_targets` / `remove_target` / `to_transport` / `target_run_dir`) backed by `WorkspaceMetadata.targets`.
- `molexp.workspace.utils` — `slugify` and small helpers.
- `molexp.workspace.workspace` — `Workspace(Folder)` entity + `set_cli_root_override`; the only `Folder` whose `parent` is `None`. Materializes its own root in `__init__`.

**Layer 2 — `src/molexp/workflow/` (middle — graph engine)**
- `molexp.workflow` (`__init__.py`) — package root re-exporting the public OOP API.
- `molexp.workflow._graph_decl` — internal task-registration declarations (`TaskRegistration`, `LoopDecl`, `ParallelDecl`, `DependentParamsFn`, `_BoundaryStubTask`).
- `molexp.workflow._helpers` — `_callable_name` / `_stable_workflow_id` / `_to_snake_case` (private helpers).
- `molexp.workflow._names` — `generate_name` (adjective-gerund-noun ids for runs/executions).
- `molexp.workflow.builder` — `WorkflowBuilder` (mutable; decorator + OOP styles on one instance).
- `molexp.workflow.cache` — `Caching` (LRU) + `CacheEntry` + `CACHE_FORMAT_VERSION`.
- `molexp.workflow.cache_store` — `CacheStore` Protocol + `FileCacheStore` (workspace-backed adapter).
- `molexp.workflow.context` — `TaskContext` + `ActorContext` (read-only typed contexts).
- `molexp.workflow.contract` — sidecar contract layer: `WorkflowContract`, `TaskIO`, `TaskInputSpec`, `TaskOutputSpec`, `ArtifactDecl`, `ValidationCheck` / `ValidationCheckId` / `ValidationIssue` / `ValidationReport` / `Severity`, `default_validation_checks`, `validate_workflow_contract`.
- `molexp.workflow.promote` — `promote_callable` / `resolve_callable_entrypoint` / `resolve_spec_entrypoint`.
- `molexp.workflow.protocols` — `Runnable` / `Streamable` `@runtime_checkable` `Protocol`s + structural typing aliases (`TaskBody`, `TaskOutput`, `UserDeps`, `JSONMapping`).
- `molexp.workflow.registry` — `TaskTypeRegistry` + `default_registry` (slug → factory).
- `molexp.workflow.serializer` — `WorkflowCompiler` + `default_compiler` (IR ↔ Python ↔ Mermaid ↔ YAML ↔ Spec; replaces old `compiler.py`).
- `molexp.workflow.snapshot` — `TaskSnapshot` (AST-normalized identity).
- `molexp.workflow.snapshot_ref` — `WorkflowSnapshotRef` (on-disk reference shape).
- `molexp.workflow.spec` — `Workflow` (compiled, frozen, content-hashed); carries the class-level `_bindings_registry` for `bind_to / for_experiment / is_bound_to / unbind_from`.
- `molexp.workflow.task` — `Task` / `Actor` plain `abc.ABC` base classes (NOT pg `BaseNode`).
- `molexp.workflow.types` — `WorkflowResult`, `WorkflowExecution`, `End` re-export, edge sum types (`UnconditionalEdges` / `BranchEdges` / `OutEdges`), error hierarchy, `Next` (IR-internal, not in `__all__`).
- `molexp.workflow.version` — `WorkflowVersion`, `TaskTopologyEntry`, `WorkflowVersionConflictError`.
- `molexp.workflow._pydantic_graph` (private subpackage) — sole `import pydantic_graph` site; modules: `compiler.py` (`WorkflowGraphCompiler`), `node.py` (`WorkflowStep`), `persistence.py` (`RunStorePersistence`), `runtime.py` (`GraphWorkflowRuntime` + `make_execution_id`), `state.py` (`WorkflowState`, `WorkflowDeps`, `CompiledWorkflow`).
- `molexp.workflow.schema` — JSON-Schema Draft-07 wire-format docs (`workflow.json`, `task_config.json`, `link.json`, `task_io.json`, `workflow_contract.json` + `README.md`).

**Layer 3 — `src/molexp/agent/` (top — LLM harness)**
- `molexp.agent` (`__init__.py`) — package root; public surface = four mode-orchestration names + a workflow-orthogonal review primitive set.
- `molexp.agent.capability_discovery` — `CapabilityDiscoveryService` Protocol + `DefaultCapabilityDiscoveryService` (composes a probe with a hint policy; consumed by PlanMode discovery nodes).
- `molexp.agent.capability_hints` — `TRUSTED_NAMESPACES` / `TRUSTED_NAMESPACE_ALIASES` / `LEGACY_VALIDATION_NAMESPACES` constants + `CapabilityHint` / `CapabilityHintPolicy` / `CapabilityTriggerInput` / `ConstraintViolation` / `HintStrength` / `NoHandRolledLAMMPSDataCheck` / `TrustedNamespacePolicy` / `validate_hint_constraints`.
- `molexp.agent.folders` — `Agent(Folder)` (`kind = "agent.agent"`, owns typed `add_session / get_session / has_session / list_sessions / remove_session`) and `AgentSession(Folder)` (`kind = "agent.session"`, owns `read_messages / write_messages` via lazy `_pydanticai.messages_codec`). Filenames `agent.json` / `agent_session.json` / `messages.jsonl`.
- `molexp.agent.folders_metadata` — `AgentMetadata` / `AgentSessionMetadata` (extend `FolderMetadata`); `SessionStatusStr` literal.
- `molexp.agent.mode` — `AgentMode` ABC + `AgentRunResult` (frozen pydantic, carries `text` / `messages` / `mode_state` / `usage` / `usage_breakdown`).
- `molexp.agent.review` — `ReviewPolicy` Protocol, `ReviewDecision`, `ReviewView` / `StepView`, three concrete policies (`BypassPolicy` / `AutoPolicy` / `HumanPolicy`), `cli_ask` (the default CLI prompt rendering surface).
- `molexp.agent.router` — `Router` Protocol (text + structured paths) + `ModelTier` enum + `RouterTextResult` + `TierModels` alias; the public interface the `_pydanticai/router.py` implements.
- `molexp.agent.runner` — `AgentRunner` (lazy router construction on first `run()`; named-session lifecycle on top of `Agent` / `AgentSession` Folder subclasses).
- `molexp.agent.session` — `AgentSession` runtime class (plain Python; carries `session_id` / `history` / `mode_state` / `model_messages`). Distinct from the on-disk `agent.folders.AgentSession`.
- `molexp.agent.settings` — `AgentSettings` (workspace-scoped tunables; frozen pydantic).
- `molexp.agent.types` — `Goal`, `GoalMode`, `Message`, `Usage`, `CallUsage`, `UsageBreakdown`, `AgentFailure`, `FailureKind`, `SessionStatus`, `utc_now`.
- `molexp.agent.modes` — public mode subpackage (`__init__.py`, `chat.py`, `review.py`, `plan/`).
  - `molexp.agent.modes.chat` — `ChatMode` / `ChatModeConfig`; ChatMode is implemented as a 1-task workflow (`CHAT_WORKFLOW` / `ChatTurn`) so even the single-shot path is workflow-driven.
  - `molexp.agent.modes.review` — `ReviewMode` / `ReviewModeConfig` (phase-2 placeholder: `IngestReviewTarget` → `SummarizeReviewTarget` → `RenderReviewVerdict`, all raising `NotImplementedError`).
- `molexp.agent.modes.plan` (multi-file subpackage):
  - `__init__.py` — public exports (`PlanMode`, `PlanModeConfig`, `PlanResult`, `PlanRunHandoff`, `PlanFolder`).
  - `_mode.py` — `PlanMode` / `PlanModeConfig` / `PlanResult` + `_compute_resume_frontier`; adapts `AgentMode.run` to the materialize-to-workspace pipeline.
  - `_pipeline.py` — `PLAN_WORKFLOW` (8-task outer chain wrapped in `wf.loop`) plus the five stage sub-graphs (`INTAKE_SUBGRAPH` / `DISCOVERY_SUBGRAPH` / `MATERIALIZE_SUBGRAPH` / `VERIFY_SUBGRAPH`).
  - `_bookends.py` — `PrepareIteration`, `UnderstandStage`, `StrategizeStage`, `BindStage`, `MaterializeStage`, `VerifyStage`, `RepairDecide` (outer-loop bookends + the five stage drivers).
  - `capability.py` — `MOLCRAFTS_NAMESPACES` + the five frozen discovery schemas (`CapabilityNeed`, `CapabilityNeedReport`, `CapabilityEvidence`, `CapabilityEvidenceBatch`, `MissingCapability`, `CapabilityHint`, `MissReason`) + `extract_ast_refs` / `extract_declared_refs` / `validate_codegen_evidence` (pure-AST validator).
  - `context.py` — `PLAN_PIPELINE_ORDER`, `PlanRepairContext`, `format_node_label` / `format_progress_start` / `format_progress_done`.
  - `errors.py` — `SkeletonCompileError`, `CapabilityDiscoveryRequired`, `UnevidencedApiReference`, `StepRejected`.
  - `handoff.py` — `PlanRunHandoff` (frozen pydantic contract from PlanMode → future RunMode).
  - `plan_folder.py` — `PlanFolder(Folder)` (`kind = "agent.plan"`) + `PlanManifest`, `ValidationReport`, `CheckResult`, `RepairIterationRecord`; owns the on-disk plan workspace layout (`report/`, `plan/`, `ir/`, `src/`, `tests/`, `configs/`, `capability/`, `repairs/`, `runs/`).
  - `policy.py` — `PlanModelPolicy` (frozen pydantic) + `STANDARD_PLAN_POLICY` + `PLAN_NODE_NAMES` (closed set of valid PlanMode node ids).
  - `preflight.py` — `PlanPreflightCheck` / `PlanPreflightReport` / `check_plan_runtime` (provider keys, molmcp stdio handshake check).
  - `protocols.py` — `CapabilityProbe` Protocol + `PlanDeps` (frozen aggregate of services + the mutable `PlanRuntimeState` slot); re-exports `Router` / `ModelTier` / `CapabilityDiscoveryService`.
  - `schemas.py` — frozen `*Result` types + structured payloads (`PlanBrief`, `ReportDigest`, `TaskIRBrief`, `RepairIterationRecord`, `DigestResult`, `IngestReportResult`, `ClarificationResult`, `PlanBriefResult`, `SkeletonResult`, `HandoffResult`, `PlanReviewView`); re-exports `WorkflowContract` + `ReviewDecision`.
  - `state.py` — `PlanRuntimeState` (mutable dataclass) + `RepairSignal` (frozen pydantic) + `RepairSource` literal; the live cross-iteration scratch pad.
  - `tasks.py` — the 13 concrete PlanMode tasks (`PlanTask` base + `IngestReport` / `DraftReportDigest` / `ClarifyMissingInformation` / `DraftImplementationPlan` / `CompileWorkflowIR` / `CompileTaskIR` / `GenerateWorkflowSkeleton` / `GenerateTaskTests` / `GenerateTaskImplementations` / `ValidateWorkspace` / `HumanReview` / `FinalHandoffCheck`); the LLM-bearing core of the pipeline.
  - `tasks_capability.py` — `DraftCapabilityNeeds` / `DiscoverCapabilities` (the two discovery nodes) + `NullCapabilityProbe` (fail-closed fallback).
- `molexp.agent.persistence` (subpackage: `__init__.py`, `router.py`, `tiered.py`) — generic three-tier resource store (`TieredResourceStore`, `ResourceSpec`, `Scope`, `tiered_router_factory`); shared infra consumed by `agent.mcp`.
- `molexp.agent.mcp` (subpackage: `__init__.py`, `defaults.py`, `oauth.py`, `store.py`) — MCP **config** layer only (no tool dispatch): `McpStore` / `McpServerEntry` / `McpScope` / `McpSecretsStore` / `UnresolvedSecretError` / `MCP_CONFIG_FILENAME` / `MCP_SECRETS_FILENAME`; OAuth (`FileTokenStorage`, `OAuthFlowSession`, `OAuthSessionRegistry`, `build_oauth_provider`, `default_redirect_uri`, `session_registry`, `storage_for`, `START_TIMEOUT_SECONDS`); defaults (`MCP_DEFAULTS`, `MCP_SEEDED_FILENAME`, `MOLMCP_COMMAND_ENV`, `MOLMCP_USAGE_INSTRUCTIONS`, `seed_user_defaults`). Tool dispatch is pydantic-ai native (`Agent(toolsets=[MCPServerStdio(...)])`) and lives under `_pydanticai/`.
- `molexp.agent._pydanticai` (private subpackage) — sole `import pydantic_ai` site; modules:
  - `__init__.py` — `__all__: list[str] = []`.
  - `router.py` — `PydanticAIRouter` (one `Agent` per `(tier, schema | None)`); the post-rectification class that absorbed the deleted `PydanticAIHarness` + `PydanticAIProvider`.
  - `capability_probe.py` — `PydanticAICapabilityProbe` + `build_needs_agent` / `build_discovery_agent` (the no-tool drafter and the `Agent(toolsets=[MCPServerStdio(...)])` evidence-gatherer).
  - `mcp.py` — `build_mcp_server` (maps a resolved transport spec onto `MCPServerStdio` / `MCPServerStreamableHTTP` / `MCPServerSSE`) + `check_stdio_handshake`.
  - `messages_codec.py` — `dump_model_messages` / `load_model_messages` (sole pydantic-ai `ModelMessage` ↔ JSON site; uses official `ModelMessagesTypeAdapter`).
  - `retry.py` — `RetryPolicy` + `should_retry` / `sleep_for` (pure data / arithmetic; imports neither `pydantic_ai` nor `asyncio`).
  - `errors.py` — `ProviderError` + `ErrorKind` + `classify` (structural detection of pydantic-ai SDK exceptions by module name to avoid eager-loading).
  - `events.py` — `ProviderEvent` / `Outcome` / `EventCallback` (telemetry seam).

**Layer 4 — `src/molexp/server/` (FastAPI app — top of application shell)**
- `molexp.server` (`__init__.py`) — re-exports `ServerManager`.
- `molexp.server.app` — `create_app()` factory, lifespan, bundled-UI discovery, CORS for dev.
- `molexp.server.dependencies` — `Settings`, `get_workspace`, `get_settings` (FastAPI DI).
- `molexp.server.exceptions` — typed HTTP exception classes.
- `molexp.server.handlers` — workspace-error → HTTP envelope translation (`ProjectNotFoundError` → 404, `*ExistsError` → 409, etc.).
- `molexp.server.manager` — `ServerManager` lifecycle (start/stop/status/logs).
- `molexp.server.routes` (subpackage with `create_api_router()`) — `agent.py`, `agent_admin.py` (Slice-1 stub — every method returns 503 pending the `server-routes-agent-rectification` follow-up), `agent_tasks.py`, `agent_task_store.py`, `asset.py`, `catalog.py`, `execution.py`, `experiment.py`, `molq.py` (`/api/plugins/molq` read-only overview), `project.py`, `registry.py`, `review_store.py`, `reviews.py`, `run.py`, `targets.py` (compute-target CRUD), `workspace.py`, `_scope.py`.
- `molexp.server.schemas` (subpackage) — `requests.py`, `responses.py`, `molq.py`, `targets.py`, `workspace_runs.py`.

**Layer 5 — `src/molexp/cli/` (Typer CLI — application shell)**
- `molexp.cli` (`__init__.py`) — Typer `app` instance + side-effect registration of `init`, `workspace`, `session`, `config`, `runs prune`, `target`, plus third-party plugin discovery via the `molexp.cli_plugins` entry-point group.
- `molexp.cli.__main__` — entrypoint shim.
- `molexp.cli._common` — shared rich console + `rprint` + `_TERMINAL_STATUSES` + `deterministic_run_id` + `reap_zombie_run`.
- `molexp.cli.config_cmd` — `molexp config` Typer app (read/write `~/.molexp/config.json`).
- `molexp.cli.init_cmd` — top-level `molexp init [PATH]` (ergonomic alias for `molexp workspace <path> init`).
- `molexp.cli.prune` — `molexp runs prune` (interactive hierarchical execution cleanup).
- `molexp.cli.session_cmd` — `molexp session` Typer app (cached SSH transport sessions).
- `molexp.cli.target_cmd` — `molexp target` Typer app (compute-target registry CRUD).
- `molexp.cli.workspace` (subpackage) — `molexp workspace [TARGET] <command>`; the unified primary entrypoint that resolves `TARGET` (path / `user@host:/path` / `@target-name`) into `(target, transport, fs)` and dispatches to subcommands.
  - `__init__.py` — `workspace_app` + the resolution callback.
  - `explore.py` — `molexp workspace ... explore` (delegates to `molexp.tree_monitor`).
  - `interactive.py` — `run_interactive` REPL (`-i` mode).
  - `lifecycle.py` — `init` / `info` / `materialize` subcommands.
  - `monitor.py` — `monitor` / `watch` subcommands.
  - `resources.py` — `project` / `experiment` / `run` / `asset` resource subcommands (largest module — all entity CRUD lives here).
  - `run.py` — `run` subcommand (script-driven workflow execution).
  - `serve.py` — `serve` subcommand (FastAPI + bundled UI).
  - `sync.py` — `sync` / `exec` / `shell` for remote-target file ops.

**Layer 6 — `src/molexp/plugins/` (registered plugin packages)**
- `molexp.plugins` (`__init__.py`) — `Capability` enum (currently `GH` only), `PluginRegistry`, `CapabilityNotAvailable`, lazy GH loader, re-exports `CliPlugin` / `discover_cli_plugins` / `discover_ui_plugin_dirs`.
- `molexp.plugins.cli` — `CliPlugin` descriptor + `discover_cli_plugins()` + `CLI_PLUGIN_API_VERSION = "1"` + `ENTRY_POINT_GROUP = "molexp.cli_plugins"`.
- `molexp.plugins.ui` — `discover_ui_plugin_dirs()` + `ENTRY_POINT_GROUP = "molexp.ui_plugins"`.
- `molexp.plugins.gh` (subpackage: `__init__.py`, `client.py`, `models.py`, `queries.py`) — `GitHubClient`, `GitHubGraphQLError`, GraphQL/REST models (`Issue`, `PullRequest`, `Comment`, `CheckRun`, `CreatePullRequestInput`, `AddIssueCommentInput`, `UpdateProjectFieldInput`).
- `molexp.plugins.submit_molq` (subpackage: `__init__.py`, `dashboard.py`, `metadata.py`, `spec.py`, `staging.py`, `submit.py`) — molq scheduler submission + Remote Operations dashboard data source.

**Layer 7 — `ui/src/` (React 19 frontend — package-level summary)**
- `ui/src/App.tsx` + `index.tsx` + `env.d.ts` — entry shell.
- `ui/src/api/generated/` — auto-generated OpenAPI client (`core/`, `models/`, `services/`). **Never hand-edit**; regenerated with `npm run generate:api`.
- `ui/src/app/` — application root.
  - `registry.ts` (entity-type → renderer map), `types.ts`.
  - `panels/` — `CenterPanel`, `LeftPanel`, `RightPanel`, `TreeView`.
  - `layout/` — `AppShell`, `ContextBar`, `ErrorBoundary`, `ExecutionConsole`, `TopBar`.
  - `oauth/OAuthCallbackPage.tsx` — OAuth-flow landing page for remote MCP servers.
  - `components/` — `CommandPalette`, dialog primitives (`CreateProjectDialog`, `CreateExperimentDialog`, `CreateRunDialog`), and `entity/` (`DataTable`, `EmptyState`, `EntityPage`, `EntityTabs`, `OverviewPage`, `StatusBadge`, density / emptyStateCopy helpers).
  - `runs/` (new dashboard subtree) — `RunsPage` (top-level routed page) + `DashboardPanel`, `ExecutionDetailDrawer`, `RunDetailDrawer`, `RunsActivityChart`, `RunsAggregateRow`, `RunsFacetPanel`, `RunsGanttChart`, `RunsJobsTable`, `RunsKpiCard`, `RunsKpiStrip`, `RunsRecentEvents`, `RunsStatusProgress`, `RunsTabBar`, `RunsTimelineView`; data helpers `aggregates.ts` / `api.ts` / `filterParams.ts` / `statusGroups.ts` / `types.ts` / `useDashboardLayout.ts` / `useWorkspaceRuns.ts`; `charts/Sparkline.tsx`; `inspector/` (`RunInspector`, `RunInspectorDetails`, `RunInspectorPlaceholder`).
  - `settings/` (new — closest existing pattern for the upcoming "remote workspace" spec) — `SettingsPage.tsx` + `ComputeTargetsPanel.tsx` + `AddTargetDialog.tsx` + `AddTargetForm.tsx` (the UI counterpart of `molexp target add/list/remove`).
  - `renderers/` — top-level entity viewers (`AgentSessionInspector`, `AgentSettingsViewer`, `AgentViewer`, `AssetViewer`, `ExperimentViewer`, `ImageViewer`, `MetadataInspector`, `MetadataViewer`, `PlanCard`, `ProjectViewer`, `RunViewer`, `SnapshotViewer`, `TextEditor`, `WorkflowFileViewer`, `WorkflowGraph`, `WorkflowGraphViewer`, `WorkflowInspector`, `WorkflowSourceViewer`, `WorkflowViewer`) + `agentEvents.ts` / `metadata.ts` / `registerRenderers.ts`; sub-subtrees `agent_session/inspectorHelpers.ts` and `agent_settings/` (`McpServersTab.tsx` — large MCP config editor, `providerRegistry.ts`, `tabs.ts`).
  - `state/` — `api.ts` (wraps the generated client), `useWorkspaceState.ts`, `useNavigationState.ts`, `useDiscoveredFileTypes.ts`, `mcpEvents.ts`.
- `ui/src/components/` — shared presentational components: `ConfirmDialog`, `PromptDialog`, `previews/` (`MarkdownPreview`, `WorkflowPreview`), `ui/` (shadcn-style primitives: `accordion`, `alert-dialog`, `badge`, `button`, `card`, `context-menu`, `dialog`, `dropdown-menu`, `input`, `label`, `resizable`, `scroll-area`, `select`, `separator`, `skeleton`, `tabs`, `textarea`, `tooltip`, `tree`).
- `ui/src/lib/` — utilities (`contribution-registry`, `file-preview-plugins`, `file-type-discovery`, `format-time`, `plot`, `utils`, `workflow-python`, `workflow-utils`) + `plugins/` (`markdown-plugin`, `workflow-plugin`).
- `ui/src/plugins/` (new bundled plugin runtime) — `contribution-runtime.ts`, `loader.ts`, `runtime.ts`, `types.ts`; bundled plugin packages `core/` (`index.ts`), `metrics/` (`RunMetricsTab.tsx`, `index.ts`, `smoothing.ts`), `molq/` (`MolqExecutionColumn`, `MolqExecutionDetail`, `MolqJobInspector`, `MolqLogPanel`, `MolqRunInspector`, `MolqRunViewer`, `api.ts`, `format.ts`, `index.ts`, `types.ts`), `molvis/` (`MolvisTab.tsx`, `TrajectoryViewer.tsx`, `index.ts`).
- `ui/src/resolvers/` — `BaseResolver`, `WorkflowResolver`, `ContextResolver`, `DocumentResolver`, `index.ts`, `types.ts` (entity-resolution dispatch).
- `ui/src/__fixtures__/` — test fixtures.
- `ui/src/styles/`, `ui/src/types/` — shared CSS + ambient TS types (incl. `task_graph_ir.d.ts`).
- `ui/mocks/` — MSW handlers (`browser.ts`, `node.ts`, `db/index.ts`, `utils/index.ts`, `handlers/`). Handlers per route domain: `agent`, `agent_admin`, `assets`, `catalog`, `execution`, `experiments`, `index`, `molq`, `projects`, `registry`, `runs`, **`targets`** (new — MSW companion to `routes/targets.py`), `workspace`.

### Public surface

**Layer 0 — cross-layer primitives**
- `molexp` (top-level): re-exports `Experiment`, `GridSpace`, `Logger`, `ParamSpace`, `Path`, `Project`, `Run`, `RunContext`, `UniformSpace`, `Workspace`, `entry`, `get_logger`; lazy `__getattr__` resolves `workspace` / `workflow` / `plugins`.
- `molexp.path`: `Path` (subclass of `PurePosixPath`).
- `molexp._logger`: `Logger`, `get_logger`.
- `molexp.entry`: `entry`, `load_workspaces`, `find_workflow_for_run`, `clear_registry`, `load_workflow_from_entrypoint`.
- `molexp.monitor`: `RunMonitor`.
- `molexp.tree_monitor`: interactive tree-monitor entry (`run_explore` / consumed by `cli.workspace.explore`).
- `molexp.config`: `MolCfg`, `ProfileConfig`, `load_molcfg`, `normalize_profile_name`, `DEFAULT_CONFIG_FILENAMES`.
- `molexp.git`: `ensure_clone`, `fetch`, `push`, `GitWorktreeManager`.

**Layer 1 — workspace**
- `molexp.workspace` exports: `Folder`, `FolderMetadata`, `Workspace`, `Project`, `Experiment`, `Run`, `RunContext`, `RunStatus`, `Context`, `Params`, `ParamSpace`, `GridSpace`, `UniformSpace`, `WorkspaceMetadata`, `ProjectMetadata`, `ExperimentMetadata`, `RunMetadata`, `ExecutionRecord`, `ComputeTarget`, `ErrorInfo`, `Asset`, `ArtifactAsset`, `DataAsset`, `DataAssetLibrary`, `CheckpointAsset`, `LogAsset`, `OutputAsset`, `ErrorTraceAsset`, `ExecutionStateAsset`, `Producer`, `AssetCatalog`, `AssetsView`, `AssetScope`, `AssetManifest`, `CacheFolder` (singleton class — accessed via `ws.cache` property), `LocalTarget`, `RemoteTarget`, `Target`, `TargetNotFound`, `Session`, `SessionManager`, the folder-kind constants `WORKSPACE_ROOT_KIND` / `WORKSPACE_PROJECT_KIND` / `WORKSPACE_EXPERIMENT_KIND` / `WORKSPACE_RUN_KIND` / `WORKSPACE_CACHE_KIND` / `WORKSPACE_CATALOG_KIND`, the typed error hierarchy (`ProjectExistsError` / `ProjectNotFoundError` / `ExperimentExistsError` / `ExperimentNotFoundError` / `RunExistsError` / `RunNotFoundError` / `FolderMoveCollisionError`), the compute-target helpers (`add_target` / `get_target` / `has_target` / `list_targets` / `remove_target` / `target_run_dir` / `to_transport`), target parsing (`parse_target`, `resolve_target`, `target_to_transport`), and atomic I/O (`atomic_write_json`, `atomic_write_text`).
- `molexp.workspace.fs`: `FileSystem` Protocol, `PathArg`, `StatResult`.
- `molexp.workspace.fs_local`: `LocalFileSystem`.
- `molexp.workspace.fs_remote`: `RemoteFileSystem`.
- `molexp.workspace.assets`: adds `ASSET_ADAPTER`, `AnyAsset`, `parse_asset`, `ArtifactAccessor`, `CheckpointAccessor`, `LogAccessor`, `ImportAction`, and the `lineage` submodule.
- `molexp.workspace.catalog`: `AssetCatalog`, `CatalogFolder`, `RebuildReport`, `CATALOG_DIRNAME`, `CATALOG_FILENAME`, `CATALOG_SCHEMA_VERSION`.
- `molexp.workspace.cache`: `CacheFolder`, `WORKSPACE_CACHE_KIND`.

**Layer 2 — workflow**
- `molexp.workflow` exports: `Workflow`, `WorkflowBuilder`, `WorkflowCompiler`, `default_compiler`, `WorkflowResult`, `WorkflowExecution`, `End` (re-export of `pydantic_graph.End`), `Task`, `Actor`, `TaskContext`, `ActorContext`, `Runnable`, `Streamable`, `TaskTypeRegistry`, `default_registry`, `Caching`, `CacheStore`, `FileCacheStore`, `TaskSnapshot`, `WorkflowSnapshotRef`, `make_execution_id`, `promote_callable`, `resolve_callable_entrypoint`, `resolve_spec_entrypoint`, `generate_name`, the contract types (`WorkflowContract`, `TaskIO`, `TaskInputSpec`, `TaskOutputSpec`, `ArtifactDecl`, `ValidationCheck`, `ValidationCheckId`, `ValidationIssue`, `ValidationReport`, `Severity`, `default_validation_checks`, `validate_workflow_contract`), edge sum types (`UnconditionalEdges`, `BranchEdges`, `OutEdges`), versioning (`WorkflowVersion`, `TaskTopologyEntry`, `WorkflowVersionConflictError`), and the error hierarchy (`WorkflowError`, `CycleError`, `EdgeShapeError`, `EntryAmbiguousError`, `UnknownTaskError`, `UnreachableTaskError`, `UnknownRouteError`, `MissingRouteError`, `WorkflowDeadlockError`, `ParallelExecutionError`, `LoopMaxItersExceeded`).
- `Next` is intentionally **not** in `__all__` (IR-internal routing token).
- `molexp.workflow._pydantic_graph` (private): `End`, `WorkflowGraphCompiler`, `RunStorePersistence`, `GraphWorkflowRuntime` (consumed only by `workflow.spec` and `workflow.__init__`).

**Layer 3 — agent**
- `molexp.agent`: **four mode-orchestration names** — `AgentRunner`, `AgentMode`, `AgentRunResult`, `AgentSession` — **plus the workflow-orthogonal review surface** `ReviewPolicy`, `ReviewDecision`, `ReviewView`, `StepView`, `AutoPolicy`, `BypassPolicy`, `HumanPolicy`, `cli_ask`. No factories.
- `molexp.agent.folders`: `Agent`, `AgentSession` (the **on-disk** Folder subclass — distinct from the runtime `AgentSession` at `molexp.agent.session`), `AGENT_KIND`, `AGENT_SESSION_KIND`, `AGENT_METADATA_FILENAME`, `AGENT_SESSION_METADATA_FILENAME`, `MESSAGES_FILENAME`.
- `molexp.agent.folders_metadata`: `AgentMetadata`, `AgentSessionMetadata`, `SessionStatusStr`.
- `molexp.agent.router`: `Router` (Protocol), `ModelTier`, `RouterTextResult`, `TierModels`.
- `molexp.agent.session`: `AgentSession` (runtime class).
- `molexp.agent.runner`: `AgentRunner`, `AgentRunnerConfigError`.
- `molexp.agent.mode`: `AgentMode`, `AgentRunResult`.
- `molexp.agent.review`: `ReviewPolicy`, `ReviewDecision`, `ReviewView`, `StepView`, `BypassPolicy`, `AutoPolicy`, `HumanPolicy`, `cli_ask`.
- `molexp.agent.settings`: `AgentSettings`.
- `molexp.agent.types`: `Goal`, `GoalMode`, `Message`, `Usage`, `CallUsage`, `UsageBreakdown`, `AgentFailure`, `FailureKind`, `SessionStatus`, `utc_now`.
- `molexp.agent.capability_discovery`: `CapabilityDiscoveryService`, `DefaultCapabilityDiscoveryService`.
- `molexp.agent.capability_hints`: `TRUSTED_NAMESPACES`, `TRUSTED_NAMESPACE_ALIASES`, `LEGACY_VALIDATION_NAMESPACES`, `CapabilityHint`, `CapabilityHintPolicy`, `CapabilityTriggerInput`, `ConstraintViolation`, `HintStrength`, `NoHandRolledLAMMPSDataCheck`, `TrustedNamespacePolicy`, `validate_hint_constraints`.
- `molexp.agent.modes`: `ChatMode`, `ChatModeConfig`, `PlanMode`, `PlanModeConfig`, `PlanResult`, `ReviewMode`, `ReviewModeConfig`.
- `molexp.agent.modes.chat`: also `CHAT_WORKFLOW`, `ChatTurn`, `build_chat_workflow`.
- `molexp.agent.modes.review`: also `REVIEW_WORKFLOW`, `IngestReviewTarget`, `SummarizeReviewTarget`, `RenderReviewVerdict`, `build_review_workflow`.
- `molexp.agent.modes.plan`: `PlanMode`, `PlanModeConfig`, `PlanResult`, `PlanFolder`, `PlanRunHandoff`.
- `molexp.agent.modes.plan.capability`: `MOLCRAFTS_NAMESPACES`, `CapabilityEvidence`, `CapabilityEvidenceBatch`, `CapabilityHint`, `CapabilityNeed`, `CapabilityNeedReport`, `MissReason`, `MissingCapability`, `extract_ast_refs`, `extract_declared_refs`, `validate_codegen_evidence`.
- `molexp.agent.modes.plan.protocols`: `CapabilityProbe`, `CapabilityDiscoveryService` (re-export), `PlanDeps`, `PlanRepairContext`, `Router` (re-export), `ModelTier` (re-export).
- `molexp.agent.modes.plan.policy`: `PlanModelPolicy`, `STANDARD_PLAN_POLICY`, `PLAN_NODE_NAMES`.
- `molexp.agent.modes.plan.state`: `PlanRuntimeState`, `RepairSignal`, `RepairSource`.
- `molexp.agent.modes.plan.context`: `PLAN_PIPELINE_ORDER`, `PlanRepairContext`, `format_node_label`, `format_progress_start`, `format_progress_done`.
- `molexp.agent.modes.plan.errors`: `CapabilityDiscoveryRequired`, `SkeletonCompileError`, `StepRejected`, `UnevidencedApiReference`.
- `molexp.agent.modes.plan.handoff`: `PlanRunHandoff`.
- `molexp.agent.modes.plan.plan_folder`: `PlanFolder`, `PlanManifest`, `ValidationReport`, `CheckResult`, `RepairIterationRecord`.
- `molexp.agent.modes.plan.preflight`: `PlanPreflightCheck`, `PlanPreflightReport`, `check_plan_runtime`.
- `molexp.agent.modes.plan.schemas`: frozen `*Result` payload types (`DigestResult`, `IngestReportResult`, `ClarificationResult`, `PlanBriefResult`, `SkeletonResult`, `HandoffResult`, `TaskIRBrief`, `PlanBrief`, `ReportDigest`, `PlanReviewView`); re-exports `ReviewDecision`, `WorkflowContract`.
- `molexp.agent.modes.plan.tasks` / `tasks_capability`: the 13 concrete `PlanTask` subclasses + `NullCapabilityProbe`.
- `molexp.agent.persistence`: `TieredResourceStore`, `ResourceSpec`, `Scope`, `tiered_router_factory`.
- `molexp.agent.mcp`: `McpStore`, `McpServerEntry`, `McpScope`, `McpSecretsStore`, `UnresolvedSecretError`, `FileTokenStorage`, `OAuthFlowSession`, `OAuthSessionRegistry`, `build_oauth_provider`, `default_redirect_uri`, `session_registry`, `storage_for`, `seed_user_defaults`, `MCP_CONFIG_FILENAME`, `MCP_SECRETS_FILENAME`, `MCP_DEFAULTS`, `MCP_SEEDED_FILENAME`, `MOLMCP_COMMAND_ENV`, `MOLMCP_USAGE_INSTRUCTIONS`, `START_TIMEOUT_SECONDS`.
- `molexp.agent._pydanticai` (private): `__all__: list[str] = []` — nothing publicly exported; `PydanticAIRouter`, `PydanticAICapabilityProbe`, `build_mcp_server`, `check_stdio_handshake`, `dump_model_messages` / `load_model_messages`, `RetryPolicy`, `ProviderError`, `ProviderEvent` are reachable only via dotted internal paths.

**Layer 4 — server**
- `molexp.server`: `ServerManager`.
- `molexp.server.app`: `create_app`, `lifespan`.
- `molexp.server.dependencies`: `Settings`, `get_workspace`, `get_settings`.
- `molexp.server.routes`: `create_api_router` + per-domain routers (`agent`, `agent_admin` — 503 stub, `agent_tasks`, `asset`, `catalog`, `execution`, `experiment`, `molq`, `project`, `registry`, `reviews`, `run`, `targets`, `workspace`).
- `molexp.server.schemas`: wide pydantic surface for OpenAPI codegen — request models (`ProjectCreateRequest` / `ProjectUpdateRequest` / `ExperimentCreateRequest` / `RunCreateRequest` / `RunStatusUpdateRequest` / `WorkspaceOpenRequest` / `ExecutionCreateRequest` / `ApprovalRespondRequest` / `PlanDecisionRequest` / `ReviewDecisionRequest` / `SkillCreateRequest` / `SkillLaunchRequest` / `SkillUpdateRequest` / `CustomToolCreateRequest` / `CustomToolUpdateRequest` / `CustomToolHttpInvokerRequest` / `McpServerUpsertRequest` / `McpHttpSpecRequest` / `McpStdioSpecRequest` / `McpSecretSetRequest` / `McpOAuth2AuthRequest` / `McpOAuthCallbackRequest` / `AssetUpdateRequest` / `AgentProviderUpdateRequest` / `GoalCreateRequest` / `UserMessageCreateRequest` / `CommandParseRequest` / `TargetCreateRequest`), responses (project / experiment / run / workspace / execution / asset / catalog / metrics / lammps / workflow snapshot / task type / agent session / agent task / tool / health / cache / command / skill / custom tool / mcp / review / ui-plugin / folder / file / target — `TargetListResponse` / `TargetResponse` / `TargetTestCheck` / `TargetTestResponse`), molq overview (`MolqJobDetailResponse` / `MolqJobsResponse` / `MolqJobSummary` / `MolqJobTransition` / `MolqQueueStats` / `MolqTargetListResponse` / `MolqTargetSummary`), workspace-runs aggregate (`WorkspaceRunsResponse` / `WorkspaceRunRow` / `WorkspaceExecutionRow` / `WorkspaceRunsStats` / `compute_workspace_runs_stats`). See `src/molexp/server/schemas/` for the full enumeration; this surface drives `ui/src/api/generated/`.

**Layer 5 — cli**
- `molexp.cli`: `app` (Typer instance). Top-level commands: `molexp init`, `molexp workspace [TARGET] <command>` (primary entrypoint), `molexp session …`, `molexp config …`, `molexp runs prune`, `molexp target …`. Third-party plugins discovered via the `molexp.cli_plugins` entry-point group.
- `molexp.cli._common`: `console`, `rprint`, `_TERMINAL_STATUSES`, `deterministic_run_id`, `reap_zombie_run`.
- `molexp.cli.workspace`: `workspace_app` Typer; subcommands attached as side effects from `explore`, `interactive`, `lifecycle`, `monitor`, `resources`, `run`, `serve`, `sync`.

**Layer 6 — plugins**
- `molexp.plugins`: `Capability` (`GH` only), `CapabilityNotAvailable`, `PluginRegistry`, `registry`, `CliPlugin`, `discover_cli_plugins`, `discover_ui_plugin_dirs`, `CLI_PLUGIN_API_VERSION`.
- `molexp.plugins.cli`: `CliPlugin`, `discover_cli_plugins`, `ENTRY_POINT_GROUP = "molexp.cli_plugins"`, `CLI_PLUGIN_API_VERSION = "1"`.
- `molexp.plugins.ui`: `discover_ui_plugin_dirs`, `ENTRY_POINT_GROUP = "molexp.ui_plugins"`.
- `molexp.plugins.gh`: `GitHubClient`, `GitHubGraphQLError`, `Issue`, `PullRequest`, `Comment`, `CheckRun`, `CreatePullRequestInput`, `AddIssueCommentInput`, `UpdateProjectFieldInput`.
- `molexp.plugins.submit_molq`: scheduler submission helpers; submodules `submit`, `metadata`, `spec`, `dashboard`, `staging` provide the surface (no `__init__.py` re-exports beyond docstring).

**Layer 7 — ui**
- TypeScript ESM exports — primary surface is the auto-generated OpenAPI client (`api/generated/`). Hand-written modules export per-file React components (`*Viewer.tsx`, `*Inspector.tsx`, `*Page.tsx`, `*Panel.tsx`), Zustand store hooks (`useWorkspaceState`, `useNavigationState`, `useDashboardLayout`, `useWorkspaceRuns`), `registerRenderers()`, `resolvers/index.ts`, MSW handler arrays, the contribution-registry runtime (`plugins/runtime.ts`, `contribution-runtime.ts`, `loader.ts`, `types.ts`), and the bundled plugin entrypoints (`plugins/core/index.ts`, `plugins/metrics/index.ts`, `plugins/molq/index.ts`, `plugins/molvis/index.ts`). Public registration points: `app/registry.ts` (entity-type → renderer), `app/renderers/registerRenderers.ts`, `plugins/runtime.ts` (UI-plugin loader), `mocks/handlers/` per-domain handler arrays.

### Style summary

**Layer 0 — cross-layer primitives**
- naming: snake_case modules; underscore prefix (`_logger`, `_run_cancel`, `_typing`) marks "shared infra used by every layer but not part of the public surface".
- construction: pure data + thin helpers; no I/O at import (the cancel helpers / monitors lazy-load `molq.dashboard`).
- error handling: `RunMonitor` / `tree_monitor` recover from missing molq job ids with structured warning return rather than raising.
- I/O discipline: `Path` is pure path arithmetic — never reaches the filesystem; the filesystem `Path` (stdlib) is reached only through `workspace.fs_local`.

**Layer 1 — workspace**
- naming: `PascalCase` types, `snake_case` functions; `*Metadata` pydantic models for on-disk shapes; `*Asset` for typed asset variants; `*ExistsError` / `*NotFoundError` for typed exceptions; `Folder` subclasses live alongside their entity module (`workspace.py` / `project.py` / `experiment.py` / `run.py` / `cache/folder.py` / `catalog/folder.py`).
- construction: pure-data types are `pydantic.BaseModel(frozen=True)`; runtime entities are `Folder` subclasses with explicit `__init__`; child factories (`workspace.add_project(...)`, `project.add_experiment(...)`, `experiment.add_run(...)`) are idempotent and lazy — no I/O in `__init__` except `Workspace`, which materializes its own root.
- error handling: typed exceptions in `errors.py` carry the entity id; atomic JSON via temp-file + `os.replace` in `LocalFileSystem.atomic_write_json`; folder kind validation (`_KIND_PATTERN`); the generic five-verb CRUD raises `*NotFoundError` on strict get, returns cached on idempotent add.
- I/O discipline: **every I/O call routes through `self._fs` (a `FileSystem` Protocol)** — never raw `pathlib.Path.read_text` etc. `LocalFileSystem` and `RemoteFileSystem` are the two stock implementations.

**Layer 2 — workflow**
- naming: builder/spec separation (`WorkflowBuilder` → `Workflow` after `.build()`); `*_to_*` method names on `WorkflowCompiler`; error class names `<Verb>Error`; edge sum types `<Noun>Edges`.
- construction: value types are `BaseModel(frozen=True)` (e.g. `WorkflowResult`, `TaskSnapshot`, `WorkflowSnapshotRef`, `WorkflowVersion`, `WorkflowContract` / `TaskIO` / `ValidationReport`); runtime container `WorkflowExecution` is a plain class because it holds live asyncio state; `Task` / `Actor` are plain `abc.ABC` subclasses (NOT pg `BaseNode`); `_pydantic_graph/` is the only subtree allowed to use `@dataclass` (forced by pg's contract).
- error handling: `WorkflowError` hierarchy raised at compile time; `ParallelExecutionError` aggregates per-element failures with index-keyed dict; `LoopMaxItersExceeded` is a non-fatal `Warning`; cache `read` corruption is logged + entry deleted (never re-raised); compile-time validation in `WorkflowGraphCompiler.compile` fails fast.
- single-track scheduler: one `WorkflowStep` `BaseNode` drives the whole scheduler; `_invoke_one` cascades `Task → Actor → Runnable → Streamable → callable`; `Next(label)` deliberately not in `__all__`.

**Layer 3 — agent**
- naming: four mode-orchestration names (`AgentRunner` / `AgentMode` / `AgentRunResult` / `AgentSession`) + the review primitive set; concrete modes are `<Verb>Mode` + matching `<Verb>ModeConfig`; per-mode workflows live under `modes/<verb>/`; private subpackage prefixed `_pydanticai/`. Two `AgentSession` classes by design — one runtime (`agent.session`), one on-disk Folder subclass (`agent.folders`).
- construction: pure data is `pydantic.BaseModel(frozen=True)` (per CLAUDE.md `arbitrary_types_allowed=True` is **forbidden** here); runtime containers are plain Python (`AgentRunner`, runtime `AgentSession`, `PlanRuntimeState`); the `_pydanticai.router.PydanticAIRouter` is constructed **lazily on first `AgentRunner.run()`**.
- error handling: typed `AgentFailure` / `FailureKind` enum; pipeline-level failures plant a `RepairSignal` on `PlanRuntimeState` rather than raising; `ReviewMode.run` raises `NotImplementedError` (phase-2 placeholder); `_pydanticai.errors.ProviderError` is the single SDK-failure boundary type.
- import discipline: `import molexp.agent` does not eagerly load `pydantic_ai`; `pydantic_graph` is **never** imported under `agent/`; only `agent/_pydanticai/*.py` may `import pydantic_ai`. Even the `messages_codec` module respects this — agent-layer callers see only `tuple[Any, ...]`.

**Layer 4 — server**
- naming: route modules named after the domain entity (`run.py`, `experiment.py`, `targets.py`, …); request schemas suffixed `*Request`, response schemas suffixed `*Response`; per-domain `APIRouter` aggregated by `create_api_router()`.
- construction: routes registered via `include_router`; FastAPI DI through `Depends(get_workspace)` / `Depends(get_settings)`; lifespan async context manager; CORS in dev, static-file mount in production.
- error handling: typed exceptions in `server/exceptions.py` mapped to JSON envelopes by `handlers.py:register_exception_handlers`; bundled-frontend lookup via `importlib.resources` falls back gracefully when `dist/` empty.

**Layer 5 — cli**
- naming: command modules named `<verb>_cmd.py` at the top level (`init_cmd`, `config_cmd`, `session_cmd`, `target_cmd`); the primary `molexp workspace …` entrypoint is itself a subpackage (`cli.workspace`) with one file per subcommand (`explore.py`, `lifecycle.py`, `resources.py`, …).
- construction: single Typer `app` instance built in `cli/__init__.py`; sub-typer apps (`workspace_app`, `session_app`, `config_app`, `target_app`, `runs_app`) are attached via `add_typer`; resolution of `TARGET` happens in the `workspace_app` callback, which stores `(target, transport, fs)` on `ctx.obj` for subcommands.
- error handling: per-plugin `try / except Exception` with `logger.warning` so one broken plugin cannot prevent the CLI from booting; `_TERMINAL_STATUSES` constant for non-cancellable run states.

**Layer 6 — plugins**
- naming: subpackage names `<category>_<implementation>` (`submit_molq`); one subpackage per `Capability`; `gh.client.GitHubClient` is async-only.
- construction: capability lazy loader pattern (`_load_gh()` imports `httpx` + the impl); `PluginRegistry` caches success / failure per `Capability`; `CliPlugin` is a frozen `__slots__` class with `register: Callable[[typer.Typer], None]`.
- error handling: every entry-point load wrapped in `_safe_load` / `_safe_resolve`; `api_version` mismatches and duplicate plugin ids are warned + skipped, never raised; `CapabilityNotAvailable` carries an `_INSTALL_HINTS` install hint.

**Layer 7 — ui**
- naming: PascalCase for components (`*Viewer.tsx`, `*Inspector.tsx`, `*Page.tsx`, `*Panel.tsx`); camelCase for hooks (`use*`); kebab-case for routes; `state/` holds Zustand stores; bundled plugin packages live under `plugins/<id>/` with a `index.ts` registration entrypoint.
- construction: React 19 + Rsbuild; renderers registered via `registerRenderers.ts` keyed by entity-type strings in `app/registry.ts`; bundled plugins registered via `plugins/runtime.ts` + `contribution-runtime.ts`; OpenAPI client regenerated by `npm run generate:api` (never hand-edit `api/generated/`); MSW handlers under `mocks/handlers/` mirror server route domains 1:1.
- error handling: panels render fallbacks for missing data; UI-plugin loader logs and skips broken bundles; OAuth callback page surfaces backend errors verbatim.

### Layer roles

- `molexp.path` / `molexp._typing` / `molexp._logger` / `molexp.entry` / `molexp.monitor` / `molexp.tree_monitor` / `molexp._run_cancel` / `molexp.config` / `molexp.git` — **Layer 0 (cross-layer primitives)**. Citable from any layer. They MUST NOT import any of `molexp.workspace`, `molexp.workflow`, `molexp.agent`, `molexp.plugins`, `molexp.server`, `molexp.cli` at module load (`molexp.entry` and `molexp.monitor` lazy-import workspace types inside functions or under `TYPE_CHECKING`).
- `molexp.workspace` — **Layer 1 (workspace)**, bottom of the dependency DAG. Pure storage primitive. Owns the `Folder` base class, the `FileSystem` Protocol + two implementations, assets, hierarchy, atomic JSON, the singleton `CacheFolder` / `CatalogFolder`. **MUST NOT import** `molexp.workflow`, `molexp.agent`, `molexp.plugins`, `molexp.server`, `molexp.cli`, `pydantic_ai`, or `pydantic_graph`.
- `molexp.workflow` — **Layer 2 (workflow)**. Graph engine. Uses `molexp.workspace` only (for `Run`, `RunContext`, `atomic_write_json`, the `CacheFolder.as_cache_store()` adapter). **MUST NOT import** `molexp.agent` or `pydantic_ai`. May import `pydantic_graph` **only** under `workflow/_pydantic_graph/`.
- `molexp.workflow._pydantic_graph` — **Layer 2 / private**. Sole `import pydantic_graph` site in the repo. `WorkflowStep` is the single `BaseNode` molexp exposes; rest is molexp-owned scheduling.
- `molexp.workflow.schema` — **Layer 2 / wire-format**. JSON-Schema documents consumed by the agent layer's IR emitters and the server's IR round-trip.
- `molexp.agent` — **Layer 3 (agent)**, top of the core dependency DAG. LLM harness. Uses `molexp.workspace` (Folder, Workspace, Run, RunContext, AssetCatalog, Project, Experiment) and `molexp.workflow` (Workflow, WorkflowBuilder, Task, TaskContext, default_registry, Runnable). **MUST NOT import** `molexp.plugins`, `molexp.server`, `molexp.cli`. May import `pydantic_ai` **only** under `agent/_pydanticai/`. **Never** imports `pydantic_graph`. `import molexp.agent` must not eagerly load either SDK.
- `molexp.agent._pydanticai` — **Layer 3 / private**. Sole `import pydantic_ai` site; new pydantic-ai construction points (`router.py`, `capability_probe.py`, `mcp.py`, `messages_codec.py`) must land here; agent's other submodules consume only the Protocols defined in `agent/router.py` / `agent/modes/plan/protocols.py`.
- `molexp.agent.modes` / `agent.modes.plan` / `agent.capability_discovery` / `agent.capability_hints` / `agent.folders` / `agent.folders_metadata` / `agent.mcp` / `agent.persistence` / `agent.review` / `agent.router` / `agent.session` / `agent.runner` — **Layer 3 / agent subsystems**. Each owns a private subdirectory or single file and (where applicable) a `Folder` kind (`agent.agent`, `agent.session`, `agent.plan`).
- `molexp.server` — **Layer 4 (application shell — FastAPI app)**. Sits on top of `agent + workflow + workspace`. UI is downstream via OpenAPI codegen. Owns route-domain split + Pydantic schemas for the wire.
- `molexp.cli` — **Layer 5 (application shell — Typer CLI)**. Sits on top of `agent + workflow + workspace`. Reorganized around `molexp workspace [TARGET] …` as the primary entrypoint, with `init` / `session` / `config` / `runs prune` / `target` as top-level siblings. Discovers third-party CLI plugins via `molexp.cli_plugins` entry-point group.
- `molexp.plugins` — **Layer 6 (registered plugin packages)**. Registry of optional capabilities (`GH` only; the legacy `AGENT` / `CODING` registry indirection was removed alongside `AgentService` / `CodingAgentClient`). Discovers third-party CLI / UI plugins via entry-point groups.
- `ui/src` — **Layer 7 (frontend)**. React 19 SPA. Downstream of `molexp.server` via the auto-generated OpenAPI client (`ui/src/api/generated/`). New runs dashboard (`app/runs/`) and settings panel (`app/settings/` — the closest existing pattern for the upcoming "remote workspace" spec) sit alongside the existing renderers. Bundled into `src/molexp/dist/` by `npm run build` and shipped in the wheel.

### Deletions verified absent (vs. 2026-05-09 blueprint)

The `agent-pydanticai-rectification` chain and the workspace `Folder` unification removed several subtrees / modules that the previous blueprint still listed:

- **agent layer**: `agent/_pydanticai/harness.py` and `agent/_pydanticai/provider.py` (both replaced by the single `agent/_pydanticai/router.py:PydanticAIRouter`); `agent/sessions/` (absorbed into the `Agent` / `AgentSession` Folder subclasses at `agent/folders.py`); `agent/context/` (its `ContextManager` / `DefaultContextManager` / `ContextPacket` / `ContextBuildRequest` / `ContextBudget` / `ContextRef` / `PromptComposer` / `PromptLayer` / `ContextCompressor` / `NoopCompressor` / `TailCompressor` are all gone — the only `PlanRepairContext` survivor lives at `agent/modes/plan/context.py`); `agent/memory/` (`MemoryStore` / `MemoryRecord` / `JsonlMemoryStore` / `NoopMemoryStore`); `agent/recovery/` (`AgentError` family + `ConstraintSet` + `RecoveryPolicy` Protocol + `NoRetryPolicy` / `SimpleRetryPolicy`); `agent/skills/` (`Skill` / `SkillStore` / `ParsedCommand` / `parse` / `CommandKind` and the `native/` directory); `agent/tools/` (`ToolSpec` / `ToolResult` / `ToolContext` / `ToolCallable` / `RegisteredTool` / `ToolRegistry` / `ToolDispatcher` / `ApprovalGate` / `AutoApproveGate` / `DenyAllGate` / `ToolPolicy` / `ApprovalDecision` / `PERMISSIVE_POLICY` / `READ_ONLY_POLICY` / `ToolSource` / `native_tool` / the `native/` tool registry); `agent/mcp/source.py`, `agent/mcp/tool_store.py`, `agent/mcp/probe.py` (parallel-to-pydantic-ai dispatch and probing — now done via `pydantic_ai.Agent(toolsets=[MCPServerStdio(...)])` and `MCPServerStdio.list_tools()`). The `_legacy_types.py` / `sessions/migrate.py` / `observability/usage.py` / `orchestration/` / `sandbox.py` / `factory.py` / `service.py` / `model.py` / `model_registry.py` / `planning/` / `replan.py` / `coding_protocol.py` deletions remain confirmed.
- **workspace layer**: `workspace.subsystem.SubsystemStore` is gone — the singleton system folders (`CacheFolder` / `CatalogFolder`) now subclass `Folder` directly and live under `workspace/cache/` and `workspace/catalog/` subpackages.
- **workflow layer**: `workflow.compiler` is gone — renamed `workflow.serializer.WorkflowCompiler` (still re-exported on `molexp.workflow.__init__` as `WorkflowCompiler` + `default_compiler`).
- **cli layer (major reorganization)**: `cli/serve_cmd.py`, `cli/run_cmd.py`, `cli/explore_cmd.py`, `cli/watch_cmd.py`, `cli/workspace_cmd.py`, `cli/runs.py`, `cli/asset.py`, `cli/project.py`, `cli/experiment.py` are all gone, replaced by the `cli/workspace/` subpackage (`explore.py`, `interactive.py`, `lifecycle.py`, `monitor.py`, `resources.py`, `run.py`, `serve.py`, `sync.py`) plus the new top-level `cli/init_cmd.py`, `cli/config_cmd.py`, `cli/session_cmd.py`, `cli/prune.py`, `cli/target_cmd.py`.
- **sweep layer**: `src/molexp/sweep/` is gone (was an empty reserved directory in the 2026-05-09 blueprint; now removed entirely).
<!-- mol:map:managed end -->

## Conventions

This section lives **outside** the `mol:map:managed` markers and survives
re-runs of `/mol:map`.

### Reserved subsystem kinds

The workspace charter (CLAUDE.md `## Layer charters`) requires subsystem
kinds to match `lowercase ASCII, dot-separated, no path traversal`. The
following kinds are reserved by the agent layer and must not be re-used
by other consumers:

- `agent.sessions` — `agent.sessions.SessionCatalog` private storage
  (existing).
- `agent.plan-experiments` — **reserved 2026-05-09 by the
  `planmode-workspace-pipeline-*` chain** for PlanMode-materialized
  experiment workspaces; consumed via
  `Workspace.subsystem_store("agent.plan-experiments")` in
  `agent/modes/plan/workspace_layout.py` (sub-spec 03 onward).
- `workflow.cache` — `WorkspaceCacheStore` content-addressed result
  cache (existing).
